raw_output:
PR #157 security review (Claude, Fable 5, orchestrator). NO FINDINGS. Carrier adds only review-attestation JSON. No secrets/tokens/health data in the artifacts (they contain review prose, severities, dispositions, file:line refs, issue numbers — no PAT, no Oura data, no credentials). No .github/workflows or scripts/review_gate.py change. No executable content. Threat model impact: none.

--- Carrier note ---
Docs-only release-artifact carrier (docs/process/review-gate.md release scope): adds docs/reviews/pr-151/ (the v0.1.1 dev->main battery legs) plus this pr-157/ set. Entire diff is under docs/reviews/, which the gate excludes from its hash — so the reviewed_diff_sha256 here is the empty-string sha256 (e3b0c44...), and merging this carrier does not restale PR #151's attestation.
